content: Let's call the amount Paul saved up "x". If he received 11 dollars more, he would have x + 11 dollars. Since we don't know the exact value of x, we can't determine the exact number of 5-dollar toys he could buy.
raw_content: Let's call the amount Paul saved up "x". If he received 11 dollars more, he would have x + 11 dollars. Since we don't know the exact value of x, we can't determine the exact number of 5-dollar toys he could buy.
